title: Template
description: A named Jinja2 template loaded from a capability's templates/ folder (agency/ontology.py + agency/capability.py; Spec 153 Slice 6 — discover-prompt wave). The engine records one Template node per discovered .j2 file; the body is the raw template source. Rendered output becomes a Document or Artefact.

name.description: Stable identifier — the capability-prefixed template name, e.g. 'develop/session-brief'.

body.description: Raw Jinja2 template source. Rendered at verb call time with the verb's context dict.
